data.body:
[Digital Soundtrack Release Notice]

Blue Archive's Anniversary OST Digital Soundtracks are out! To celebrate, the KO version of the "Yumeji no Hana (Dreampath Flower)" music video has come out too!🎹🎵

💌Music Video : https://youtu.be/dDLotRRLeTY
➡️View Details : https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2684603

#BlueArchive
